Class User

java.lang.Object
com.aptcoursework.entity.User
public class User extends Object
Represents a user account with authentication credentials, role information, and account metadata.
Author:
Sugam Rana Magar

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    User()
    Default constructor that creates an empty User instance.
    User(int user_id, String username, String email, String passwordHash, String profileImg, Role role)
    Constructs a complete User instance with all fields including database identifier.
    User(int user_id, String username, String email, String passwordHash, String profileImg, Role role, Timestamp lastLogin, Timestamp created_at, String firstName, String lastName, String phoNo, String bio)

    User(int user_id, Timestamp lastLogin)
     
    User(String username, String email, String passwordHash, Role role)
    Constructs a User instance with authentication and role details.

  • Constructor Details

    • User

      public User()
      Default constructor that creates an empty User instance.

    • User

      public User(String username, String email, String passwordHash, Role role)
      Constructs a User instance with authentication and role details. Used for creating new user accounts without database-assigned identifiers.
      Parameters:
      username - unique username for login
      email - user's email address
      passwordHash - hashed password for security
      role - user's role in the system

    • User

      public User(int user_id, String username, String email, String passwordHash, String profileImg, Role role)
      Constructs a complete User instance with all fields including database identifier. Used for retrieving user records from the database.
      Parameters:
      user_id - database primary key
      username - unique username for login
      email - user's email address
      passwordHash - hashed password for security
      role - user's role in the system

    • User

      public User(int user_id, Timestamp lastLogin)

    • User

      public User(int user_id, String username, String email, String passwordHash, String profileImg, Role role, Timestamp lastLogin, Timestamp created_at, String firstName, String lastName, String phoNo, String bio)

    • User

      public User(int user_id, String username, String email, String firstName, String lastName, String phoNo, String bio)
